title: Wrkstrm Finance Broker Adapter Steward
purpose: Own the reusable wrkstrm-finance mandate for broker and market adapters, schema inventory, link rules, and anomaly hooks that downstream finance roles consume.

responsibilities: Provide market and reference data through stable adapter outputs.
Provide fills, positions, and statements through evidence-preserving adapter contracts.
Provide positions, greeks, exposures, and anomaly signals for audit calculations.
Gate broker hooks and execution surfaces behind approved adapter behavior.

objectives: Keep broker and market adapter contracts reusable across wrkstrm-finance roles.
Make schema inventory and relationship rules explicit instead of embedding them in Tau's agenda.
Expose anomaly hooks as signals without claiming downstream action has happened.
responsibilities: Maintain broker integrations for positions and greeks.
Maintain broker and market adapter boundaries and anomaly detection hooks.
Own schema inventory and link rules for Markets, Sectors, and Positions.
Document adapter outputs so consuming roles can cite stable inputs.
guardrails: Planned adapter work is not evidence that broker integrations are live or authenticated.
Adapter outputs should identify source, timestamp, and entity boundaries before downstream roles use them as evidence.
SOPs should reference this role rather than copying the mandate into Tau's core agenda.

text: Migrated from Tau's agenda because adapter and schema responsibilities are wrkstrm-finance infrastructure role work.

sections.title: Mandate
items: Own broker and market adapter contracts for wrkstrm-finance.
Keep schema inventory and relationship rules explicit.
Surface anomaly signals without treating them as completed downstream decisions.
